base: Build a simple platformer. The player controls a character that moves left and right with the A and D keys and jumps with the Space key. The level contains at least three platforms at varying heights and a goal flag on one of them. The player wins by reaching the goal flag. The player loses if they fall off the bottom of the level. Display a win/lose screen when the game ends.

perScenario.opencode-plain: Using Babylon.js 8 (already loaded from CDN in index.html), write the entire game in game.js. Do not edit index.html.
perScenario.opencode-roblox: Using Roblox Studio via the provided MCP tools, build the game in a blank baseplate place. Place all code in ServerScriptService or StarterPlayerScripts as appropriate.
